dashboard.label: About
dashboard.description: MITRE ATLAS AI Threat Detection for Splunk

div.h1: MITRE ATLAS AI Threat Detection for Splunk
div.p: This app provides 10 detection rules for AI and LLM threats, mapped to the MITRE ATLAS framework. Each rule is a Splunk saved search that monitors your AI/LLM logs for known attack patterns including prompt injection, jailbreak attempts, data exfiltration via inference APIs, training data poisoning, and model reconnaissance.

All rules ship disabled by default. Use the Setup tab to verify your data, configure the atlas_index macro, and enable the rules that match your environment. The Configuration Guide tab provides platform-specific instructions for getting AI/LLM data into Splunk.

GIC Engineering is building the Supply Chain & AI Threat Intelligence Platform — full SBOM correlation, supply chain risk scoring, and audit-ready compliance reporting for PCI DSS 4.0 and NIST CSF 2.0. Coming 2026.
Questions, issues, or feature requests: contact@gicengineeringconsultants.com
Apache License 2.0. Free for commercial and personal use.

search.query: | inputlookup atlas_techniques.csv | table technique_id, technique_name, tactic, severity, description | sort technique_id
